## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change (no feature/fix)
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)
